title: Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III units to begin separate trading
content:
* Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III (NASDAQ:IPCXU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IPCXU]) completed its $253M initial public offering on April 28, 2025, including 3.3M overallotment units.
 	* Separate trading of Class A ordinary shares (IPCX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IPCX]) and rights (IPCXR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IPCXR]) begins June 16, 2025.
 	* Source: Press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20134238-inflection-point-acquisition-corp-iii-announces-the-separate-trading-of-its-class-a-ordinary] 

MORE ON INFLECTION POINT ACQUISITION CORP. III UNITS

 	* Financial information for Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III Units [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IPCXU/income-statement]
